text: Stepping from a quiet, minimalist corridor into this vibrant exhibit, I feel a surge of curiosity. The sterile glass and empty chairs outside contrast sharply with the energy of the R+D space—words, color, and invention surround me. Here, reflection and anticipation intertwine; I sense the pulse of shared human endeavor, and I'm drawn to ponder the boundaries of solitude and collaboration. In this place designed for research and progress, I feel both oddly exposed and inspired, suspended between the known and the possible.
